items.title: Create a Vector Collection
items.description: Teradata Enterprise Vector collection is a specialized database designed to store and manage high-dimensional vectors, that is, numerical representations of data like text and images. Rather than rely on exact keyword matches, vector collections use a semantic search by storing data as vectors. The key use cases include:

children.title: Manage vector store
children.description: View the various parameters that you have used while creating the selected vector collection.

children.title: Active vector collections
children.description: As a data analyst or administrator, you can manage the vector collections that you have created or have access to.

children.title: Edit vector indexing
children.description: By default, you see the indexing and search options that you have set while creating the vector collection.

children.title: Edit search algorithms
children.description: Teradata supports these indexing and search algorithms:

children.title: Edit search settings
children.description: After indexing, you query the vector store to retrieve relevant data. The system compares your query to stored vectors and returns top-k matches. The results depend on the vector store type:

children.title: Manage chunking
children.description: Modify the chunking method used between Basic and SherpaLLM.

children.title: Edit chunking
children.description: Modify the chunking method you chose while creating the vector collection. Once done, save the changes to update the vector collection.

children.title: Edit chunking definition
children.description: Modify the name and description for the vector collection. Ensure, the name is unique.

children.title: Change vector embeddings
children.description: Select the required embedding model that you want to use. The available models are:

children.title: Manage vector data sources
children.description: You can add a new data source or remove an existing data source and save the vector collection.

children.title: Add collection data
children.description: Select the PDF files to convert into vectors. You can drag and drop the PDF files.

children.title: Add data tables
children.description: Select the PDF files to convert into vectors.

children.title: Add data columns
children.description: Only available if you have changed data or the embedding model. In the confirmation, select the appropriate choice.

children.title: Add metadata columns
children.description: Add metadata columns for the vector collection based on your requirements. The embeddings will change and you can check the performance in the Playground.

children.title: Add data key columns
children.description: Ensure you are adding correct data to avoid unwanted impact to the embedding models and thus results. You can add raw data or existing embeddings.

children.title: Vector store playground
children.description: Use the playground to test the accuracy of your vector collection.

children.title: Use a playground
children.description: The playground allows you test your vector collection and assess the accuracy of the results,

children.title: Manage playground search settings
children.description: Teradata supports these indexing and search algorithms:

children.title: Manage vector store users
children.description: You can add new users or search the existing users, from this page. Using filters, you can search users based on name and access levels.
